changeSet.author: Hromov
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO dbo.projects (title, description, user_id) VALUES ('GraphiumDB Engine', 'Core graph database engine development', 1), ('NURE Student Portal', 'Unified portal for university services', 1), ('CyberGuard Pro', 'Network security monitoring tool', 2), ('AI Path Finder', 'Algorithm for shortest path in dynamic maps', 3), ('SocketGame Engine', 'Real-time multiplayer framework', 4), ('Social Graph API', 'High-performance social relationship service', 5), ('Cloud Storage Manager', 'Distributed file system interface', 6), ('CryptoWallet v2', 'Secure cryptocurrency storage solution', 7), ('Data Vision Tool', 'Analytical dashboard for graph data', 8), ('Mobile Learning App', 'Educational platform for computer science', 9), ('Web Crawler Bot', 'Distributed web indexing service', 10), ('Smart Home Hub', 'IoT device management platform', 11), ('E-Commerce Core', 'Microservices for online retail', 12), ('Traffic Optimizer', 'City-scale traffic flow simulator', 13), ('BioGraph Research', 'Graph modeling for biological networks', 14);

rollback.sql: DELETE FROM dbo.projects WHERE title IN ( 'GraphiumDB Engine', 'NURE Student Portal', 'CyberGuard Pro', 'AI Path Finder', 'SocketGame Engine', 'Social Graph API', 'Cloud Storage Manager', 'CryptoWallet v2', 'Data Vision Tool', 'Mobile Learning App', 'Web Crawler Bot', 'Smart Home Hub', 'E-Commerce Core', 'Traffic Optimizer', 'BioGraph Research' );
